query:
SELECT
                g.user_id,
                g.coins,
                g.gems,
                g.stamina,

                COALESCE(l.level, 0) AS level,
                
                m.prestige

                FROM gambling g
                LEFT JOIN levels l ON g.user_id = l.user_id
                LEFT JOIN gambling_mine m on g.user_id = m.user_id
                WHERE g.user_id = $1;
